content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add working directory support to click.edit()' - adding working_dir param to click.edit()/Editor.__init__/Editor.edit_file/Editor.edit in src/click/termui.py and src/click/_termui_impl.py. Will use targeted edits to signatures/docstrings only, not full rewrites, to avoid clobbering your escape_shell changes. Let's each add our new param as an additional keyword-only-ish param appended at the end of existing param lists.

ack — looks like we're each in separate repo copies (my file doesn't show your escape_shell changes). I've added working_dir to Editor.__init__/edit_file (cwd=self.working_dir in Popen) and click.edit(). Finalizing and submitting my patch now.
